summary: Key findings for COIN price direction over 8 trading days
content: COIN closed at 164.32 on Feb 13 after a 16.4% single-day bounce from 141.09. Stock has been in severe downtrend from ~255 in early Jan to 139.36 low (52-week low) on Feb 12. BTC crashed ~50% from $126K Oct peak to ~$68K. Key catalysts: $2B buyback announced, Q4 2025 earnings miss but capital return cheered, JPMorgan OW with $252 target, CEO selling shares, analyst downgrades. Monte Carlo results: Full bootstrap P(up)=25%, Zero-mean GBM P(up)=47%, Recent bootstrap P(up)=28%. Daily vol ~5.7% (90% annualized).
